text: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM) Purpose: Promote agricultural mechanization via subsidies for machinery. Eligibility: Landholding farmers, SHGs, User Groups, Cooperatives, FPOs, and entrepreneurs. Benefits: Financial assistance (subsidies) ranging from 50% to 80% for purchasing ag-machinery. Priority for women and small/marginal farmers. Application: Online via official portal (https://agrimachinery.nic.in/) with Aadhaar and land records.

Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY) - RAFTAAR Purpose: Support infrastructure, innovation, and entrepreneurship in agriculture and allied sectors. Eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, cooperatives, startups, and MSMEs. Benefits: Grants for infrastructure; startups can receive seed funding (up to ₹25 lakh) and pre-seed support (up to ₹5 lakh). Application: Farmers via State Agriculture Dept; startups apply through RKVY Agri-Business Incubators (R-ABIs).

National Food Security Mission (NFSM) Purpose: Incentives for crop production (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Cereals). Eligibility: All categories of farmers; priority for women, SC/ST, and small/marginal farmers. Benefits: Subsidies for high-yielding seeds, improved tech demos, integrated nutrient/pest management, and efficient irrigation. Application: Via local Rural Agricultural Extension Officer or district-level agriculture office.

Formation and Promotion of 10,000 FPOs Purpose: Dedicated scheme to form registered Farmer Producer Organizations for economies of scale. Eligibility: Groups of farmers wishing to form a legal entity (FPO). Benefits: Professional handholding, training, and financial support (equity grant and credit guarantee) for sustainability and market access. Application: Register as FPO and apply through agencies like SFAC, NABARD, or NCDC.

National Bamboo Mission (NBM) Purpose: Support the entire bamboo value chain from cultivation to manufacturing. Eligibility: Individual farmers, govt agencies, artisans, entrepreneurs, FPOs, and SHGs. Benefits: Financial assistance for nursery development, high-density cultivation, post-harvest processing, and manufacturing units. Application: Online via State Bamboo Mission portals with land proof or project reports.
